prerequisites: Your account subdomain, the prefix in your account URL https://YOUR_SUBDOMAIN.nocrm.io.
An API key generated from your noCRM account.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: noCRM authenticates with an API key. The connector collects this as the api_key field, which is required and stored as a secret.

setupSteps.title: Generate an API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your noCRM account and generate an API key. Copy the key and keep it secret.

setupSteps.title: Find your subdomain
setupSteps.body: Your subdomain is the prefix in your account URL: for https://YOUR_SUBDOMAIN.nocrm.io it is the YOUR_SUBDOMAIN portion.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the subdomain field and paste the API key into the api_key field.
